name: Rum Raisin Cheesecake Bars
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Pat Dwigans
To make the crust, cream together the butter and brown sugar. Stir in the flour, and add the nuts. Press into an 8-9 inch square pan. Reserving some of the crumbs to use as a topping. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes; cool.
With a mixer, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Add the sugar, egg, and rum, beating well. Then stir in the raisins. Spread the mixture over the cooked crust, then sprinkle with the remaining crumbs. Bake in a 350°F oven for about 20-25 minutes. Makes 9-12 servings.
